rules.description: Production outage, data loss, or security breach — pages on-call
rules.notes: Highest precedence — evaluated before any area-based rule. Leading spaces in HTTP code keywords avoid false matches on version strings like 'v500'.

rules.description: Authentication functionality broken (login, MFA, SSO, tokens)
rules.notes: Splits auth from payments so the rule_applied label is precise. Both still resolve to High / P1.
Revenue-impacting; on-call ladder cares about these the most after outages.

rules.description: UI cosmetic issue (alignment, color, typo, padding) with no functional failure
rules.notes: The exclude list demotes reports that mention cosmetic terms but describe a real functional failure (e.g. 'button alignment is broken AND clicking it fails').

rules.description: Performance regression — latency, memory, bundle size
rules.notes: Not in the current hard-coded ruleset but a natural extension; here so the table demonstrates how a new area-based rule lands.
Catch-all. Must remain LAST in the list — validated at load time.
